database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person
WHERE {
  ?committee rdf:type conf:Committee .
  ?committee conf:has_a_name "YSWC 2015 Program Committee" .
  ?committee conf:has_members ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?email
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_an_email ?email .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

sparql_queries:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person
WHERE {
  ?committee rdf:type conf:Committee .
  ?committee conf:has_a_name "YSWC 2015 Program Committee" .
  ?committee conf:has_members ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?email
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_an_email ?email .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (c:Committee)<-[:MEMBER_OF]-(p:Person)
WHERE c.name = "YSWC 2015 Program Committee"
RETURN p.ID AS person
SELECT Person as person_id, VALUE as email FROM has_an_email WHERE Person IN (585, 584, 403, 313, 48)

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找属于‘YSWC 2015 Program Committee’委员会的所有成员，返回他们的ID和姓名。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[r:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee)
WHERE c.name = 'YSWC 2015 Program Committee'
RETURN p.ID AS person_id, p.first_name AS first_name, p.last_name AS last_name

MATCH (author:Person)-[r:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE author.first_name = 'Gigi'
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, paper.title AS paper_title
results: perspicuously disjoined nigglings midmonths labium peeped daydreams permuting

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的详细评审意见。
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses."

"The paper ""ZSWC-2014"" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular"

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (CONCAT(?first_name, ?last_name) = "Raktavira")
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p1:Paper)
RETURN p1.ID AS paper

}

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name "Cloelia" .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
}
repair_details.final_query:

PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有作者名为‘Cloelia’的人员所撰写的论文，返回论文ID、作者姓名和论文标题。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[r:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE author.first_name = 'Cloelia'
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, paper.title AS paper_title
results: bedstraws thoughtless elation swampland earings circumscribed paralyzingly
